```
GlobalSection(SolutionConfigurationPlatforms) = preSolution
    Debug|Any CPU = Debug|Any CPU
    Release|Any CPU = Release|Any CPU
EndGlobalSection
```

But it's missing the `ProjectConfigurationPlatforms` section that maps each project GUID to a solution configuration. Without this, MSBuild skips all projects.
